name: Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crust ingredients together and spread evenly in a nine-inch glass pie plate to form a crust. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes, until lightly browned.
2. Grate carrots: Nuke grated carrots in water on high power for 2-3 minutes.
3. Sauté onions: Nuke sliced onions in water on high power for 2 minutes. Drain the onions and set aside.
4. Prepare filling: Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese onto the bottom of the rice crust. Layer onion slices over the cheese. Mix Eggbeater, grated Parmesan, carrots, and desired seasonings (pepper, oregano, garlic powder). Pour the mixture into the crust.
5. Bake: Cook in the microwave on 60% power for 15 minutes, rotating every 5 minutes or so until set.
